sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: Position units = Account_Equity / f$, where f$ = (optimal_f × largest_loss_dollars) / |largest_loss_percent|. Optimal f value determined empirically by author from historical largest loss. Example: f$=166.67 yields 1 unit per $166.67 equity.

source_rule_text: Position size should be 1 unit per f$ dollars of account equity, where f$ is calculated using the optimal f formula based on largest loss.
